reviews.comment:
Si compras el lavado económico le ponen poco entusiasmo y lo dejan mal, parecería que solo te atienden bien si compras la opción premium. Para eso por favor saquen la opción económica, es una falta de respeto.

(Translated by Google)
If you buy the economy car wash, they're less than enthusiastic and leave it in bad shape. It seems like they only serve you well if you buy the premium option. For that, please take out the economy option; it's disrespectful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNzlQS0lnEAE

reviews.comment:
Unos súper ladrones . La gente del taller mecánico no evalúan las posibilidades. Te pasan presupuestos altísimos . El auxilio mecánico es bueno. Pero los del taller te dicen cualquier cosa con tal q les pagues una fortuna o que te lleves el auto para no tener q laburar

(Translated by Google)
They're absolute crooks. The mechanics at the shop don't assess the situation. They give you outrageous estimates. The roadside assistance is good, but the mechanics will tell you anything as long as you pay them a fortune or take the car so they don't have to do any work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bU1UZmNBEAE
